description: NSIDC is the National Snow and Ice Data Center, a data and research center focused on cryospheric data such as snow, ice sheets, glaciers, sea ice, and related Earth science datasets. It publishes data access resources and documentation for NSIDC-managed datasets and services.
summary: NSIDC exposes one documented public HTTP API surface: the NSIDC Web Service Documentation Index API with an OpenAPI spec; no NSIDC-hosted GraphQL, MCP, or developer CLI surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: NSIDC Web Service Documentation Index API
